title: polypodium moniliforme var. subdicarpum
intro: Polypodium moniliforme var. subdicarpum, also known as the Chain Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are obtained from its fronds and rhizome. The health benefits of Polypodium moniliforme var. subdicarpum include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as an antiseptic to treat wounds. The plant is prepared as an infusion or tea, or dried and used in herbal supplements, and it's also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
